description: Create a low-battery alert rule (ne101_camera template exposes values.battery — also verifies the rule-validator fix that reads template metrics)

turns.user: Create a rule: notify me when sensor-001 values.battery drops below 20. Name it low-battery-warning

per_turn: Turn 1: Agent should call `neomind rule create` with condition device:sensor-001:values.battery < 20, action notify
